title: Commercial Handheld Sign Set Board AI
sourceTitle: Commercial Handheld Sign Set Board AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical commercial handheld sign set board for new coffee shop opening campaign, built as six separate physical promotional signs with specific event mood variant with readable visual details. Subject: Six independent KT/PVC hand-held signs stay complete and separate, each tailored to new coffee shop opening campaign with icon details from coffee cup, croissant, bean, camera, gift box, location pin, bold Chinese promo text, and finished event-material structure. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Fixed 9:16 single-image layout with a clear 2-column by 3-row grid; every sign has its own boundary, varied silhouette, full edge visibility, and consistent spacing without overlap or merging. Signature Elements: Use varied but coordinated silhouettes such as speech bubbles, comic bursts, arrows, rounded tags, coupon cards, product-shaped boards, and lightning frames; integrate coffee cup, croissant, bean, camera, gift box, location pin as rich 3D mini-icons without clutter. Style: High-completion commercial promotion-material design with mature retail polish, original die-cut forms, rich but controlled detail, and a real object-ready finish rather than flat stickers. Color Palette: Unified activity palette using one dominant campaign color with supporting colors and bright accent tones, vivid enough for event visibility while staying cohesive across all six pieces. Lighting: Soft product-board lighting with subtle drop shadows, small bevel highlights, and enough contrast to make the layered cutout edges readable on white. Materials: Physical KT board or PVC cutout look: thick white outer strokes, colorful irregular base boards, inner highlight outlines, local gradients, raised layers, and stable die-cut edges suitable for hand-held production. Typography: Each sign contains large readable bold Chinese promotional lettering; numbers, discounts, prices, gifts, and benefit keywords are enlarged as the visual center when present. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

Subject: Six independent KT/PVC hand-held signs stay complete and separate, each tailored to beauty salon anniversary event with icon details from mirror, lipstick, flower, sparkle, gift box, appointment card, bold Chinese promo text, and finished event-material structure. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Fixed 9:16 single-image layout with a clear 2-column by 3-row grid; every sign has its own boundary, varied silhouette, full edge visibility, and consistent spacing without overlap or merging. Signature Elements: Use varied but coordinated silhouettes such as speech bubbles, comic bursts, arrows, rounded tags, coupon cards, product-shaped boards, and lightning frames; integrate mirror, lipstick, flower, sparkle, gift box, appointment card as rich 3D mini-icons without clutter. Style: High-completion commercial promotion-material design with mature retail polish, original die-cut forms, rich but controlled detail, and a real object-ready finish rather than flat stickers. Color Palette: Unified activity palette using one dominant campaign color with supporting colors and bright accent tones, vivid enough for event visibility while staying cohesive across all six pieces. Lighting: Soft product-board lighting with subtle drop shadows, small bevel highlights, and enough contrast to make the layered cutout edges readable on white. Materials: Physical KT board or PVC cutout look: thick white outer strokes, colorful irregular base boards, inner highlight outlines, local gradients, raised layers, and stable die-cut edges suitable for hand-held production. Typography: Each sign contains large readable bold Chinese promotional lettering; numbers, discounts, prices, gifts, and benefit keywords are enlarged as the visual center when present. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
